title: Invincible Pets
description: Adds vanilla friendly craftables used to make tamed pets Invincible.
body:
### OVERVIEW
Invincible Pets adds 3 vanilla-friendly crafting recipes to your world, the resulting items allowing you to make your tamed Wolf, Cat, or Parrot Invincible. 

### Core Features
- **Adds 3 Items: _"Fishy Treat"_, _"Boney Treat"_, and _"Seedy Treat"_**
- **Adds vanilla-friendly crafting recipes for above items** _(all three recipes consist of the pet's respective taming food surrounded by any combination of eight flowers in a crafting table)_
- **Sneak-Interacting with any tamed pet while holding their respective treat will make that pet _immune to all forms of vanilla damage_**

### Toggleable Features
- Petal Particles: Disable to remove the periodic cherry blossom leaf particles that spawn around invincible pets
- Creative Protection: Enable to make invincible pets immune to damage from players in creative mode as well
- No Player Hostililty: Enable to make wolves unable to target other players as attack targets in multiplayer servers 

### Additional Notes / Info
- item only successfully applys to an already tamed pet
- by default, players in creative mode will still be able to damage invincible pets
- players in survival or adventure mode will be unable to target or damage invincible pets, there are no damage ticks or hurt noises
- use the /reload command when in a server to add all invpet crafting recipes to all online players' recipe books
- using an invpet item on its corresponding pet applys the invincibility effect to up to 5 pets of the same type in a small radius / for best results on a single entity, make sure no pets of the same type are nearby

### Useful Management Commands 
- /scoreboard players set value wolvesdontattackplayers 1
  - _makes wolves unable to target other players as hostile (takes ~1 minute to go through)_
- /scoreboard players set value noparticles 1
  - _disables periodic (30 sec) cherry leaf particle spawn around invincible pets_
- /kill @e[tag=invpet,distance=..5,limit=1,sort=nearest]
  - _kills the nearest invincible pet within a 5 block radius_
- /execute as @e[tag=invpet] run tag @s add invpetclear
  - _makes all (loaded) invincible pets no longer invincible (takes ~1 minute to go through)_
